identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a runtime reliability platform that feels like a tactical command center—dense, precise, and immediately trustworthy.
principles: Tactical Precision: Every pixel must serve a purpose. Density is a feature, not a bug.
Signal over Noise: Color is for status and alerts ONLY. The UI framework disappears.
The 'Alive' Interface: Dashboards should feel like they are breathing—pulsing indicators, real-time updates.
Deep Focus: Dark mode is mandatory. Use contrast to guide the eye to anomalies.

StatusBadge.description: A pill-shaped indicator for health status.
StatusBadge.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

MetricCard.description: Small card displaying a single key metric with a trend indicator.
MetricCard.style: bg-card border p-4 rounded-lg hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors

LogViewer.description: Terminal-like component for viewing console logs.
LogViewer.style: font-mono text-xs bg-[#0c0c0c] border border-border/50 rounded-md p-4 overflow-x-auto max-h-[400px] text-gray-300 custom-scrollbar

Timeline.description: Vertical list of events (route runs or alerts).
Timeline.style: relative border-l border-border/50 ml-3 pl-6 py-2 space-y-6

ScreenshotViewer.description: Modal or panel to view captured screenshots of failures.
ScreenshotViewer.style: aspect-video bg-muted rounded-md border flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden relative group

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 border-b z-50 sticky top-0

icons.style: stroke-[1.5px] w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings if possible; stick to the defined typography scale.
Always include data-testid attributes for testing.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standards).
Use Skeleton loaders for async data.
Never use full-screen gradients. Use subtle ambient glows.
Dates must be formatted using 'date-fns' (e.g., 'MMM d, HH:mm:ss').
Interactive elements must have hover and focus states.
For 'Route Run Detail', allow collapsing/expanding of large JSON blobs or Logs.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Tactical Obsidian' theme in 'tailwind.config.js' first.
Create a layout wrapper 'DashboardLayout' with a sidebar navigation and top bar.
Use 'recharts' ResponsiveContainer for all charts to ensure they fit the grid.
Mock data generation is critical. Create realistic 'route runs' with timings, status codes, and console logs.
For the 'Screenshot Viewer', use a placeholder image service if no real screenshot is available, or a simple 'No Screenshot' state.
Ensure the 'Config Viewer' pretty-prints the JSON configuration.
The 'Alert History' should visually connect related state transitions (e.g., Triggered -> Resolved).
